response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior generalist with deep web/backend experience (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) but lacks the core requirements for this role: native-level Japanese proficiency is not indicated, there is no embedded firmware or LAN-switch development experience, and C for UNIX is only briefly mentioned (NI LabWindows/CVI, 2014-2015). No demonstrated background in MACsec, 802.1X, Linux kernel modification, or switch chip/SDK work.
strengths: Long senior-level track record across multiple tech stacks
Some C/C++ experience at National Instruments
Strong software craftsmanship, TDD, and CI/CD background
concerns: No evidence of native-level Japanese language proficiency
No embedded firmware, LAN-switch, or Linux kernel modification experience
Lacks security-specific networking expertise (MACsec, 802.1X, NETCONF, SNMP)
